description: Directory of mutual aid and community support groups in the Chicago area, verified active within 15 months (since Feb 2025). Citywide coverage — North, South, West, Southwest sides, and suburbs.

contact_summary.js_walled_sites: ~20 sites confirmed live but contact info requires browser rendering (Squarespace/Wix/Webflow/WordPress.com)

phases_completed.phase_2_schema: Multi-file architecture, 5 documentation pages, complete data model
phases_completed.phase_3_contacts: 38 contact entries, 11 emails, 7 phones extracted via sub-agent scraping
phases_completed.phase_4_volunteer: 15 groups confirmed accepting volunteers with application processes
phases_completed.phase_5_gap_fill: Far South Side coverage established (Roseland, Auburn Gresham)

remaining_work.js_walled_extraction: ~20 sites need browser rendering for email/phone — Chinese Mutual Aid, CUSP, CEJN, Between Friends, WINGS, Village Chicago, CYP, Cultural Alliance, WCDC, GCLC, John Walt, CRA, Legal Aid Chicago, CAICC, and others
remaining_work.caps_pdf: 5.6MB PDF at capsinc.org — needs workspace download + PDF extraction
remaining_work.block_club_article: 60+ groups in 'Give Local 2025' article — JS-walled, needs browser rendering
remaining_work.sites_to_retry: Pilsen Solidarity Network, Mutual Aid Dawning, ONE Northside (connection errors — may be temporary)
remaining_work.geocoding: 11 locations have addresses, need lat/lon via geocoding API
remaining_work.outreach_execution: outreach_log.csv ready — 15 groups with confirmed volunteer processes ready for first contact
